page: Microsoft Azure E96ds_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine from the Edsv7 family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 96 vCPUs mapped to 48 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor operating at 4.2 GHz. The system is equipped with 768.0 GB of RAM, providing a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per core. It includes 5669 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, with no bundled GPUs.

Benchmark data indicates top-tier performance across multiple domains. The Intel Xeon processor delivers top-tier results in Passmark CPU tests, including extended instructions, physics, and encryption. Memory performance is highlighted by top-tier read-only small block bandwidth of 7496.51 GB/sec, while large block read and write bandwidths remain strong. The server excels in data processing, achieving top-tier ratings in gzip compression, bzip3 decompression, and redis SET operations at 159.97 million operations per second.

This configuration is highly suited for memory-intensive workloads, large-scale database operations, and high-throughput web serving. The 5669 GB local storage combined with top-tier database operation benchmarks makes it an efficient choice for relational databases and in-memory caching systems like Redis. While CPU and memory bandwidth performance are exceptionally strong, the Passmark memory score falls in the average tier, representing a potential tradeoff for specific memory-latency-sensitive applications.
description: Microsoft Azure E96ds_v7 is a memory-optimized virtual machine powered by an Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor with 96 vCPUs and 48 physical cores running at 4.2 GHz. It features 768.0 GB of RAM, establishing a high 8.0 GB per core ratio, alongside 5669 GB of local storage. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, this server delivers top-tier performance in CPU-intensive tasks, database operations, and redis SET operations, which reach 159.97 million operations per second. It also exhibits top-tier cached memory bandwidth and strong uncached read/write speeds. Lacking a GPU, it is not designed for hardware-accelerated graphics workloads. Instead, its massive memory capacity, substantial local storage, and high-frequency processor make it highly efficient for enterprise databases, in-memory caching, large-scale data compression, and high-throughput web serving.
og_description: Microsoft Azure E96ds_v7 is a memory-optimized server with 96 vCPUs, 768 GB RAM, and 5669 GB local storage. It delivers top-tier database, Redis, and CPU performance for enterprise workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure E96ds_v7 features 96 Intel Xeon vCPUs, 768 GB RAM, and 5669 GB local storage, optimized for databases and high-throughput workloads.
tagline: A high-capacity memory-optimized server featuring ninety-six vCPUs and substantial local storage for demanding database and data-processing workloads.
bullet_points: 96 vCPUs and 768 GB RAM delivering a high 8.0 GB per core memory ratio
5669 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Top-tier database and Redis performance exceeding 159 million operations per second
Intel Xeon 6973P-C processor running at 4.2 GHz with 480 MB L3 cache
Optimized for enterprise databases, in-memory caching, and high-throughput web serving
